field_definitions.name: card identifier
field_definitions.description: This coloumn identifies the type of card involved
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T18:49:37.666601

field_definitions.name: elapsed time
field_definitions.description: The elapsed time between ringing and recoveries dates will be calculated by computer
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T18:51:11.427347

field_definitions.name: direction
field_definitions.description:
Calculated by computer and printed as 001-360, in degrees (360 = 000 = N).
1_1 1_1 1_1 indicates no movements
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T18:53:08.458083

field_definitions.name: distance
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T18:55:07.098829

field_definitions.name: moult and biometrics on finding
field_definitions.description:
The information that a moult card has been completed and a biometrical record taken are "flags" for the user to contact the relevant organisation for details if he so wishes.
The fact that the bird was moulting its flight feathers may be used as data
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T19:00:11.573472

field_definitions.name: status when found, other relatives recovered
field_definitions.description: Status code exatcly matches that in column 21 for ringing
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T19:19:50.477762

field_definitions.name: previous reports, changes to ring or colour rings
field_definitions.description: Bird not released or bird released but without identification ring (ring removed)
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T19:22:37.516575

field_definitions.name: finding details presumed, bird transported before recovery or transported or held before being released with ring
field_definitions.description: Numeric code unless eventually released after transportation or holding, in which case alphabetic code
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T19:25:10.634437

field_definitions.name: finding circumstances
field_definitions.description: Two digits numeric and hierarchic code
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T19:29:44.703869

field_definitions.name: finding condition
field_definitions.description: Numeric code gives the condition of the bird when found or the outcome of the act of finding
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T19:30:53.649103

field_definitions.name: quadrant recovery
field_definitions.description: Letter code indicating quadrants of the world formed by the equator, 0°, 100°E, 180°, 100°W longitude
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T19:32:55.995487

field_definitions.name: quadrant ringing
field_definitions.description: Letter code indicating quadrants of the world formed by the equator, 0°, 100°E, 180°, 100°W longitude (ringing)
evolution_notes: Field added manually on 2026-03-20T19:34:16.644693

validation_rules.error_message: Species code must be exactly 5 digits
Scheme country must be 2 uppercase letters
Ring number must be 1 letter followed by 6 digits
Age code must be a single digit
Sex code must be a single digit

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 6 and value.isdigit() and 1 <= int(value[:2]) <= 31 and 1 <= int(value[2:4]) <= 12
validation_rules.error_message: First date must be 6 digits in valid DDMMYY format

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 6 and value.isdigit() and 1 <= int(value[:2]) <= 31 and 1 <= int(value[2:4]) <= 12
validation_rules.error_message: Current date must be 6 digits in valid DDMMYY format

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 6 and value[:-1].isdigit() and value[-1] in ['N', 'S'] and 0 <= int(value[:2]) <= 90 and 0 <= int(value[2:4]) <= 59
validation_rules.error_message: Latitude must be valid degrees (00-90) and minutes (00-59) followed by N or S

validation_rules.rule_expression: len(value) == 6 and value[:-1].isdigit() and value[-1] in ['E', 'W'] and 0 <= int(value[:3]) <= 180 and 0 <= int(value[3:5]) <= 59
validation_rules.error_message: Longitude must be valid degrees (000-180) and minutes (00-59) followed by E or W
Wing length must be exactly 3 digits
Bill length must be exactly 4 digits
